macros.token: #for $j, $repeat2 in enumerate( $repeat.software_cond.output ) #if str($repeat2.type) == "bamPEFragmentSize" #set $pattern = "Frag." #set $prefix = "" #set $suffix = "" @LN_2_FILES@ #elif str($repeat2.type) == "estimateReadFiltering" #set $pattern = "Internally-determined Duplicate" #set $prefix = "" #set $suffix = "" @LN_2_FILES@ #elif str($repeat2.type) == "plotCoverageStdout" #set $pattern = "sample" #set $prefix = "" #set $suffix = "" @LN_2_FILES@ #elif str($repeat2.type) == "plotCoverageOutRawCounts" #set $pattern = "#plotCoverage --outRawCounts" #set $prefix = "" #set $suffix = "" @LN_2_FILES@ #elif str($repeat2.type) == "plotEnrichment" #set $pattern = "featureReadCount" #set $prefix = "" #set $suffix = "" @LN_2_FILES@ #elif str($repeat2.type) == "plotFingerprintOutRawCounts" #set $pattern = "#plotFingerprint --outRawCounts" #set $prefix = "" #set $suffix = "" @LN_2_FILES@ #end if #end for

param.name: type
param.label: deepTool used to generate the output?
